Browser SSRF hostname validation could be bypassed by DNS rebinding.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw`
- Ecosystem: npm
- Affected versions: `< 2026.4.10`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.4.10`

## Impact

Browser navigation policy could validate a hostname/IP resolution that differed from the address Chromium ultimately used, allowing DNS rebinding style SSRF pivots.

## Technical Details

The fix tightens strict browser hostname navigation so unallowlisted hostname URLs fail closed under restrictive policy.

## Fix

The issue was fixed in #64367. The first stable tag containing the fix is `v2026.4.10`, and `openclaw@2026.4.14` includes the fix.

## Fix Commit(s)

- `121c452d666d4749744dc2089287d0227aae2ed3`
- PR: #64367

## Release Process Note

Users should upgrade to `openclaw` 2026.4.10 or newer. The latest npm release, `2026.4.14`, already includes the fix.

## Credits

Thanks to @zsxsoft, with sponsorship from @KeenSecurityLab and @qclawer for reporting this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00199, "percentile": 0.09749}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-xq94-r468-qwgj", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-17T21:58:01Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xq94-r468-qwgj", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-xq94-r468-qwgj"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-43582"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-17T21:58:01Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-xq94-r468-qwgj", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/64367", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/121c452d666d4749744dc2089287d0227aae2ed3", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-43582", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-dns-rebinding-ssrf-via-hostname-validation-bypass", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xq94-r468-qwgj"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-xq94-r468-qwgj", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Browser SSRF hostname validation could be bypassed by DNS rebinding", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-12T13:35:05Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-xq94-r468-qwgj", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.10", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.10"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: Browser SSRF hostname validation could be bypassed by DNS rebinding
